bullet.name: Bullet
bullet.desc: Straightforward ranged shots. Your bread-and-butter pressure tool.

aura.name: Aura
aura.desc: Damage zone that follows you. Own the space around your character.

chain.name: Chain
chain.desc: Bouncing lightning chain between targets. Great for clumped waves.

boomerang.name: Boomerang
boomerang.desc: Returns to you after a sweep. Punishes packs that chase you.

lightning.name: Lightning
lightning.desc: Calls down strikes on nearby foes. Strong single-target burst.

ice_ball.name: Ice Ball
ice_ball.desc: Slowing projectile. Control elites and chargers before they reach you.

shadow.name: Shadow
shadow.desc: Orbiting shadow orbs. Consistent close-range damage.

laser.name: Laser
laser.desc: Piercing beam in a line. Melts lines of enemies if you aim well.

fan_blade.name: Fan Blade
fan_blade.desc: Wide melee fan of blades. Shreds anything in your face.

holy_bullet.name: Holy Bullet
holy_bullet.desc: Evolved bullet: bonus damage and armor break.

toxic_chain.name: Toxic Chain
toxic_chain.desc: Evolved chain: spreads poison as it jumps between targets.

death_laser.name: Death Laser
death_laser.desc: Evolved laser: crits on every tick with extreme reach.

blood_boomerang.name: Blood Boomerang
blood_boomerang.desc: Evolved boomerang: steals life on each hit.

storm.name: Storm
storm.desc: Evolved lightning: bonus bolts when you score kills.

shadow_storm.name: Shadow Storm
shadow_storm.desc: Evolved hybrid: shadow hits can chain lightning.

frost_nova.name: Frost Nova
frost_nova.desc: Evolved ice: area freeze on impact plus reflect tricks.

ember_fan.name: Ember Fan
ember_fan.desc: Evolved fan: wider arc and piercing ember shards.

lifesteal.name: Lifesteal
lifesteal.desc: Heal when you deal damage. Stabilizes long fights.

armor.name: Armor
armor.desc: Flat damage reduction. Stack levels to shrug chip damage.

crit.name: Crit
crit.desc: Critical strike chance and damage scaling.

explosion.name: Explosion
explosion.desc: On-kill splash damage. Snowballs in dense hordes.

magnet.name: Magnet
magnet.desc: Pulls XP and gold farther. Less running, more killing.

poison.name: Poison
poison.desc: DoT that ticks enemies down. Synergizes with chain evolutions.

shield.name: Shield
shield.desc: Blocks hits on a cooldown. Forgives small mistakes.

speed_charm.name: Speed Charm
speed_charm.desc: Move faster. Unlocks Storm-style evolutions at max.

blood_pool.name: Blood Pool
blood_pool.desc: Leaves hazardous pools. Zone control for kiting.

luck_stone.name: Luck Stone
luck_stone.desc: Better odds on rare rolls and a little extra gold.

turbine.name: Turbine
turbine.desc: Utility engine item—synergy with cooldown and area builds.

steam_armor.name: Steam Armor
steam_armor.desc: Defense with a steam-themed mitigation twist.

energy_cell.name: Energy Cell
energy_cell.desc: Powers sustained fire and cooldown recovery.

ember_heart.name: Ember Heart
ember_heart.desc: Fireheart passive that pairs with fan evolutions.

warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.desc: Balanced fighter with bonus starting damage. Great first pick.

mage.name: Mage
mage.desc: Aura starter with extra max HP. Area-control mindset.

vampire.name: Vampire
vampire.desc:
Blood-hungry hunter.
Weapon: chain (Chain — jumping hits)
Item: lifesteal (found in-run; pairs with Toxic Chain)
Evolution: toxic_chain (Toxic Chain)
Unlock: survive 2 min as Warrior → 175 gold; origin: +10% lifesteal

hunter.name: Hunter
hunter.desc: Boomerang expert with extra lifesteal synergy.

frost.name: Frost
frost.desc: Slow specialist—double slow duration, ice ball starter.

engineer.name: Engineer
engineer.desc: Laser main with area bonuses—glass cannon leaning.

paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.desc: Tanky holy starter with armor and Holy Bullet.

blood_prince.name: Blood Prince
blood_prince.desc: XP-hungry noble with Blood Boomerang fantasy.

nomad.name: Nomad
nomad.desc:
Exile skirmisher.
Weapon: fan_blade (Fan Blade — wide close fan)
Item: ember_heart (Ember Heart — fireheart passive; Ember Fan evolution)
Evolution: ember_fan (Ember Fan)
Unlock: 175 total kills → 350 gold; origin: +5 flat damage

sigil_warden.name: Sigil Warden
sigil_warden.desc:
Seal and bind specialist.
Weapon: hex_sigil (Hex Sigil)
Item: glyph_charm (Glyph Charm)
Evolution: binding_circle (Binding Circle)
Unlock: 220 kills → 400 gold; origin: +12% area, -8% speed

grav_binder.name: Grav Binder
grav_binder.desc:
Gravity well expert.
Weapon: gravity_anchor (Gravity Anchor)
Item: resonance_stone (Resonance Stone)
Evolution: void_lens (Void Lens)
Unlock: survive 6m30s → 430 gold; origin: -12% cooldown, -10% max HP

ironclad.name: Ironclad
ironclad.desc:
Frontline bulwark.
Weapon: bastion_flail (Bastion Flail)
Item: rampart_plate (Rampart Plate)
Evolution: citadel_flail (Citadel Flail)
Unlock: kill 1 tank enemy → 480 gold; origin: +3 armor, -10% speed

linebreaker.name: Linebreaker
linebreaker.desc:
Shield-charge linebreaker.
Weapon: shield_ram (Shield Ram — cone slam)
Item: iron_bulwark (Iron Bulwark — armor)
Evolution: fortress_ram (Fortress Ram)
Unlock: survive 450s → 520 gold; origin: +12% max HP, -6% damage

death_knight.name: Death Knight
death_knight.desc: Secret: Death Laser start, huge damage, brutal tradeoffs.

chaos.name: Chaos
chaos.desc: Secret: random weapon starts—pure variance runs.

omega.name: Omega
omega.desc: Secret: all weapons, 1 HP. For experts and showboaters.

vs_map.name: Fallen Kingdom
vs_map.desc: Story map—open field, 30-minute survival arc, bosses on the clock.

map2.name: Map II
map2.desc: Reserved slot. Coming in a future update.

map3.name: Map III
map3.desc: Reserved slot. Coming in a future update.
